column8: "There's a mouse in the kitchen!" said Martha. Martha said there had been a mouse in the kitchen.
column9: "We've won every match this year", Amy said. Amy said they won every match that year.
column10: "I broke my leg two weeks ago," said Spencer.Spencer said he had broken his leg two weeks ago.
column11: 'We'd heard the song before," Rory said.Rory said he had heard the song before.
column12: "I've been working since four o'clock," said Dad.Dad said he was working since four o'clock.
column13: "We're spending tomorrow by the swimming pool," Belinda said.Belinda said they have spent the next day by the swimming pool.
